host: ubu-2 RTX 5070 sm_120 driver 580 (48 SMs, 0% util / 5 MiB used at fire)
toolchain: nvcc/ptxas 12.0 (sm_120 not directly supported by 12.0 -> built compute_90 PTX, driver JIT to sm_120)
geometry: BM=64, d=64, 4 warps/CTA (block=128), grid=N/64; K/V tile 16x64 half double-buffered in smem

ptxas.sm_120: NOT supported by nvcc 12.0 (Blackwell needs 12.8+); ran via compute_90 PTX + driver JIT

occupancy.device: RTX 5070: 48 SMs, maxThreadsPerSM=1536, regsPerSM=65536, smemPerSM=102400, maxBlocksPerSM=24
occupancy.note: reg-bound at 5 CTAs/SM = 20 warps/SM; comparable to R9's 25 warps/SM single-warp. grid=N/64 is small (N=4096 -> 64 CTAs ~= 1.3 CTAs/SM); bet is intra-CTA warp parallelism + cp.async overlap beats raw grid count -- it does (best-of-campaign) but does not cross 1.0x

numeric.gate: rel_rowscale <= 1e-2 per-row-scaled vs f64 CPU ref + NaN/Inf hard-fail counter (naninf==0)

timed_median_ms._method: cuEvent 20 warmup + 200 timed median, GPU uncontended (0% util at start, reproducible to ~0.4%)

gap_closure: R9 best 1.662x (same-session) -> R10 best 1.149x @ N=4096; same-session R10 mw+cpasync is 1.447x FASTER than R9 single-warp at N=4096

lever_isolation.cp_async_lever: mw+cpasync 1.34-1.50x faster than mw-noasync at all shapes (the LARGER mover)
lever_isolation.multiwarp_lever: mw-noasync 1.04-1.37x faster than R9 single-warp (smaller, fades at N=4096 to 1.04x)
lever_isolation.verdict: BOTH levers moved it; cp.async double-buffer is dominant

residual_bottleneck: still latency-bound but now the QK^T mma -> row-reduce -> P.V mma dependency chain WITHIN each warp + the 4-warp __syncthreads barrier per K-tile; cuBLAS's two big TC GEMMs achieve higher TC pipeline utilization per launch. The 16x16 wmma tile + d=64 (only 4 d-tiles) keeps arithmetic intensity too low to saturate TCs; grid=N/64 also under-fills the 48 SMs at small N.
verdict: ORANGE — numeric PASS all 4 shapes, best-of-campaign ratio 1.149x, but does NOT cross 1.0x on any shape -> pre-registered win condition (fused_ms < cublas_stack_ms) NOT met. F-FUSION-ATTN-MULTIWARP FALSIFIED as a WIN; SUPPORTED as a quantified gap-closure.
section10_flip: NO (orange) -- GPU.md §10 attention axis-A box UNCHANGED; still NOT-above-cuBLAS at d=64
paper: NO (orange) -- /paper triggers only on GREEN capstone win
